body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Redact secrets embedded in settings.xml logs**

When a Sony AVR PSK is configured, `buildApplyFileSet()` serializes it into `addon_data/script.oppo203.iso.external/settings.xml` as a plain XML string, and `read_ssh_file` can also return an existing settings.xml string. Because string values are only truncated here and are not scanned/redacted, the debug panel can show or copy the raw PSK whenever these IPC calls are expanded or copied, despite key-based redaction working for `save_wizard_state`.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
